title: The Nyaban Brothers Enter the Battle
description: On pages 1–4, the battle for Syrup Village intensifies as the Straw Hats, Usopp, and the village’s defenders confront Kuro’s pirates.
scene: The quiet village becomes a battlefield, with Usopp’s lies turning into real courage and the Straw Hats forcing Kuro’s plan to unravel.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I didn't expect you to be held up by these kids...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The Kuro neko pirate fleet has been reduced to a truly sad state...

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Isn't that right, Jango?!?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: But... but... that day, you said that we could let that kid go...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Cause' he couldn't affect our plans!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yes, I did say that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So what?! He indeed still cannot affect our plans

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I expected that he would come after us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I just didn't expect your uselessness! I don't want any more excuses!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You said we're useless...?!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Don't look down on us, Captain Kuro...

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Indeed, you were very power- full. But that's in the past...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: What are you trying to say?

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: Hey! shut up, Buch!! SHAM!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: That was three years ago...!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You've been pampering yourself in this village! But we've never stopped our attacks!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: We've attacked quite a lot of villages...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: And sank many ships....!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Internal Con- Flict....?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We won't allow our- selves to be killed...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: for for a stupid reason like "a failed plan"!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You've been inactive for three years!

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: Do you think you can still beat us, the "Nyaban Brothers"?!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: That's true...

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: If those two gang up, even captain Jango can't beat them...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's a fact that they are our strongest team...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Sret...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Pumpkinstances

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: You're no longer our captain!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Instead of being killed by you silently, we might as well kill you first!!

summary: This part pushes the arc from conspiracy into open battle, testing Usopp’s courage and the Straw Hats’ trust in him.
